json_ld_data.name: Faction X Vuarnet Neckwarmer
json_ld_data.description: Introducing the Warm Neckwarmer, a standout piece from the Vuarnet X Faction collaboration. Made with luxurious merino wool and crafted in France, this neckwarmer boasts the prestigious Oeko-Tex Standard 100 certification. Featuring a sleek jacquard design showcasing the Vuarnet and Faction logos, it's both a fashion statement and a testament to quality. Stay stylishly warm on your winter adventures with this premium accessory.
